title: API Migration Webinar next week :) Join me!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community! As you know, the updated 2023-10 API version is stable and ready for production.

Next week - on Wednesday – I’ll be hosting a webinar on the migration process.

It’ll cover the same info as the training at the end of August, but is a great opportunity to get a refresher or answer any lingering questions you might have.

The topics we’ll cover:

  • New features & breaking changes in the updated version
  • Migration guide for product developers and account admins
  • Timeline
  • How to switch between versions

The online session will be held on Oct 25 @ 9:30am EST / 1:30pm GMT

Register here
